    • timeUnit

      public AchDepositScheduleScheduleProperties.Builder timeUnit(AchDepositScheduleTimeUnit timeUnit)
      The time unit used to calculate the interval between transfers. The time period between transfers in a scheduled series is the unit of time times the multiplier

    • timeUnit

      public AchDepositScheduleScheduleProperties.Builder timeUnit(Optional<? extends AchDepositScheduleTimeUnit> timeUnit)
      The time unit used to calculate the interval between transfers. The time period between transfers in a scheduled series is the unit of time times the multiplier

    • unitMultiplier

      public AchDepositScheduleScheduleProperties.Builder unitMultiplier(int unitMultiplier)
      The multiplier used to determine the length of the interval between transfers. The time period between transfers in a scheduled series is the unit of time times the multiplier

    • unitMultiplier

      public AchDepositScheduleScheduleProperties.Builder unitMultiplier(Optional<Integer> unitMultiplier)
      The multiplier used to determine the length of the interval between transfers. The time period between transfers in a scheduled series is the unit of time times the multiplier
